About SATCO Arabia

A specialist contractor built for the
UAE energy sector

SATCO Arabia General Contracting LLC — SPC is an Abu Dhabi-based engineering and construction contracting company, founded by a seasoned Construction Director with over 30 years of experience in oil & gas, power generation, and desalination sectors across the UAE and internationally.

We provide specialist construction management, engineering services, manpower supply, and project support to major EPC contractors and client organisations operating in the UAE's energy infrastructure sector — including projects for ADNOC Group, TAQA, DEWA, and Linde Engineering.

Our strength lies in combining the agility of a focused specialist firm with the depth of leadership that comes from decades on the front line of major capital projects — from modular fabrication yards to brown-field shutdowns, desalination plants to gas processing facilities.

Management profile

Shaik Zaheerudeen, PMP®

Executive Profile

A PMP®-certified Mechanical Engineer with 30+ years of progressive experience in engineering, construction management, and project direction across oil & gas, power, petrochemical, and desalination projects in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Scotland, and Poland. Most recently served as Yard Director for Linde Engineering in Kezad, Abu Dhabi — overseeing fabrication and assembly of 24 modules for a hydrogen plant, managing 8,000+ direct and 400 indirect personnel. Led modular fabrication of 70+ pre-assembled units (PAU) and pipe racks (PAR) weighing up to 3,000 MT for gasification plants shipped to the USA and Singapore.

Core Competencies

Project Management (PMP®) Construction Management Modular Fabrication Piping & Spool Engineering Structural Engineering Pre-commissioning Load-Out & Marine HSE Management Quality Assurance Primavera P6 Scheduling ADNOC Standards Contract Administration Vendor Management ASME / API / ANSI Codes

Career Highlights

2025 — Present
Founder & Managing Director — SATCO Arabia, Abu Dhabi

Established SATCO Arabia General Contracting LLC–SPC to provide specialist engineering, construction management, and project support services to major EPC contractors serving ADNOC, TAQA, and power sector projects across the UAE.

2022 — 2025
Yard Director — Linde Engineering, Kezad Abu Dhabi

Yard Director for fabrication and assembly of 24 modules for a hydrogen plant in Kezad, Abu Dhabi — managing 8,000+ direct and 400 indirect personnel from structural fabrication through pre-commissioning, weighing, and load-out on SPMTs to barge for international shipment.

2011 — 2022
Project & Construction Director — Linde Engineering / The Linde Group

Construction management for Borouge 2 & 3 Ethylene and polyethylene plants (Abu Dhabi) — construction management covering structural and piping fabrication, mechanical completion, pre-commissioning, logistics, and PAC/FAC handover. Also Project Director for 70+ PAU/PAR modules (300–3,000 MT) for gasification plants shipped to USA and ExxonMobil Singapore, managing 8,000+ direct personnel. Additionally served as Site Manager in Grangemouth, Scotland (Olefins plant furnace) and Poland (Air Separation Unit).

2008 — 2010
Construction Manager — Bilfinger Deutsche Babcock Middle East

Construction Manager for DEWA M Station Desalination Plant — 8 MSF desalination evaporators, steam boilers, 2×75 m stacks, sea water intake screening systems, blending and reservoir area. Managed piping (CS, SS, Duplex, GRP, HDPE), structures, static and rotary equipment through mechanical completion and client handover.

1996 — 2008
Project Engineer / Project Manager — Foster Wheeler · Hidada Ltd · Cethar Ltd

Early career covering Power plant and process plant EPC projects — Proposal Engineer at Cethar Ltd (power plant boilers), Project Engineer at Foster Wheeler (deputed to New Jersey USA for engineering coordination on structural and pressure vessel fabrication), and Project Manager at Hidada Ltd (Saudi Arabia) managing fabrication and erection of industrial plant structures.

* Detailed resume available upon request during client meetings.

What We Do

Comprehensive service capabilities

End-to-end support for engineering, construction, and project execution — tailored for the demands of major oil & gas and power infrastructure projects.

Project Management

Complete project management support including planning, scheduling, cost control, progress monitoring, and reporting for oil & gas and power projects.

Construction Management

On-site construction supervision, quality assurance, HSE oversight, workforce management, and coordination with clients and sub-contractors.

Engineering Services

Multi-discipline engineering support including piping, structural, mechanical, and electrical engineering aligned with ADNOC/TAQA standards.

Spool Engineering

Detailed spool engineering, isometric preparation, material take-off, and fabrication support for piping systems in oil & gas facilities.

Structural Engineering

Structural design, analysis, modification, and fabrication drawings for steel structures, pipe supports, platforms, and foundations.

Logistics Support

Material movement, site logistics planning, customs coordination, transportation management, and warehousing support across UAE.

Procurement Support

Minor procurement including fasteners, insulation materials, gaskets, bolts, and specialty items. Vendor sourcing and expediting support.

Equipment Rental

Supply of construction and industrial equipment on rental basis — including welding machines, scaffolding, lifting equipment, and specialized tools.

Sectors & Clients

Where our experience matters most

Oil & Gas

Upstream, midstream, and downstream project support. Experience with ADNOC Onshore, ADNOC Offshore, ADNOC Gas, and modular fabrication for gasification plants.

ADNOC Onshore ADNOC Gas Linde Engineering

Power & Energy

Power plant construction, maintenance, and upgrade projects. Experience with TAQA power generation facilities, DEWA infrastructure, and hydrogen production plants.

TAQA DEWA Hydrogen Plants

Desalination & Water

Desalination plant construction and infrastructure including MSF evaporators, steam boilers, sea water intake systems, and associated civil and mechanical works.

DEWA MSF Technology Bilfinger

Our Client Engagement Model

We partner with multinational EPC contractors and specialized service providers who hold direct contracts with ADNOC, TAQA, DEWA, and other major clients. SATCO Arabia serves as a reliable subcontractor and support partner, bringing skilled manpower, engineering expertise, and execution capability to complement our clients' project teams.

Project Track Record

Projects that define our capabilities

Selected projects from our leadership team's experience — demonstrating depth and breadth across the UAE's most demanding industrial sectors.

Linde Engineering Hydrogen Plant

Hydrogen Plant Module Fabrication — Kezad, Abu Dhabi

Yard Director for fabrication and assembly of 24 modules for a hydrogen production plant at Kezad Industrial Zone, Abu Dhabi. Managed 8,000+ direct and 400 indirect personnel from structural fabrication through pre-commissioning, weighing, load-out on SPMTs, and barge sea-fastening for international shipment.

Modules: 24 Units
Manpower: 8,000+
Linde Engineering Gasification Modules

PAU / PAR Modular Fabrication — USA & Singapore

Project Director for 70+ Pre-Assembled Units (PAUs) and Pipe Racks (PARs) ranging from 300–3,000 MT for gasification plants. Delivered to ExxonMobil Singapore site and USA destinations — including full pre-commissioning, preservation, and sea-worthy barge load-out without carry-over works.

Modules: 70+ Units
Max Weight: 3,000 MT
Borouge / ADNOC Petrochemicals

Borouge 2 & 3 — Petrochemical Plant, Abu Dhabi

Construction management for Borouge 2 and Borouge 3 petrochemical expansion projects in Abu Dhabi — covering material handling, mechanical completion, pre-commissioning, logistics, systems handover, PAC and FAC for ADNOC and Borealis joint-venture facilities.

Client: Borouge / ADNOC
Scope: Full Construction
DEWA Desalination

DEWA M Station — Desalination Plant, Dubai

Construction Manager for DEWA M Station desalination project — 8 MSF evaporators, steam boilers, 2×75 m stacks, sea water intake screening systems, blending and reservoir area. Managed piping (CS, SS, Duplex, GRP, HDPE), structures, static and rotary equipment from fabrication through mechanical completion and handover.

Client: DEWA
Scope: Full EPC Support

* Project photos from MD's previous employment with Linde Engineering and Bilfinger Deutsche Babcock. Specific client project names may be confidential.

Why SATCO Arabia

The SATCO advantage

01

Proven Leadership

Our MD brings 30+ years of direct ADNOC, TAQA, and Linde Engineering project experience with PMP® certification. When you work with SATCO, you get decades of institutional knowledge on day one.

02

Multi-Service Capability

From engineering to procurement to equipment rental — one point of contact for multiple service needs, reducing your vendor management overhead on complex projects.

03

ISO Certified Operations

ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 certified (valid to Oct 2028) — ensuring disciplined, safe, and quality-driven project execution from day one.

04

Client Standards Aware

Deep understanding of ADNOC CoPs, TAQA specifications, DEWA requirements, and international codes (ASME, API, ANSI, BS) — no learning curve, no ramp-up time needed.

05

Agile & Responsive

As a focused, lean company — we mobilize fast, adapt quickly to project needs, and provide direct access to senior leadership without bureaucratic delays.

06

Growing Toward Direct

Actively pursuing ADNOC, TAQA, and DEWA direct contractor registration. Partnering now means building a relationship before we become a directly qualified contractor.
